name: sodimac-product-readonly-report
description: HITO-057: Sodimac product detail public retail read-only report. NO clicks, NO cookies, NO login, NO cart, NO purchase.

args.rawSignals: public-html-signal: Product | public-html-signal: sku=9065911 | public-html-signal: price=38.18 | public-html-signal: priceCurrency=USD

args.notes: raw public HTML signal, not visible UIA price

steps.text: Sodimac Product Read-Only: URL={{profile.sodimacProduct.url}} | title={{bt}} | text sample={{btext}} | artifact={{productArtifact.relativePath}} | normalizedEvidence={{productEvidence.json}} | productNameCandidate={{productEvidence.productName}} | categoryCandidate={{productEvidence.category}} | descriptionCandidate={{productEvidence.description}} | priceCandidate={{productEvidence.price}} | currencyCandidate={{productEvidence.currency}} | stockCandidate={{productEvidence.stock}} | rawSignals={{productEvidence.rawSignals}} | contactSignals={{productEvidence.contactSignals}} | whatsappSignals={{productEvidence.whatsappSignals}} | cartSignals={{productEvidence.cartSignals}} | buySignals={{productEvidence.buySignals}} | paymentSignals={{productEvidence.paymentSignals}} | loginSignals={{productEvidence.loginSignals}} | cookieSignals={{productEvidence.cookieSignals}} | geolocSignals={{productEvidence.geolocSignals}} | popupSignals={{productEvidence.popupSignals}} | extractionStatus={{productEvidence.extractionStatus}} | extractionConfidence={{productEvidence.extractionConfidence}} | blockedOrMissingFields={{productEvidence.blockedOrMissingFields}} | actions.count={{actions.count}} | dangerousCommercialCount={{actions.dangerousCount}} | authRelatedCount={{actions.authCount}} | paymentRelatedCount={{actions.paymentCount}} | navPlan.hasExecutableActions={{navPlan.hasExecutableActions}} | navPlan.summary={{navPlan.summary}} | PASS_or_diagnostic=PASS_if_Sodimac_or_expected_diagnostic_visible | UIA price/currency/stock remain null unless visible text proves them. | NO clicks, NO cookies accepted, NO login, NO cart, NO purchase, NO payment.
